texto: Motherhood can be seen as a political act. (...) when adressed, disconnections can become opportunities (...) Even when sons seem to be disinterested (...), a mother's efforts are extremely important. This is how we continue to build relationship with sons.
explicacao: Citação de Cate Dooley & Nikki Fedele sobre temas ligados a familia. “Motherhood can be seen as a political act. (...) when adressed, disconnections can become opportu…” articula familia, boy-culture, motherhood em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como motherhood e mothers.
